title: Trump slams Bruce Springsteen, calls singer a ‘dried up prune’ who suffers from 'Trump Derangement Syndrome'
content:
Donald Trump publicly criticized singer Bruce Springsteen.
*   Trump referred to Springsteen as a "dried up prune."
*   He claimed Springsteen suffers from "Trump Derangement Syndrome."

title: SEBI proposes to enable share buybacks through stock exchanges
content:
SEBI has proposed a new mechanism for companies to conduct share buybacks.
*   This new method would allow buybacks to be executed directly through stock exchanges.
*   The move aims to simplify and provide an alternative channel for companies seeking to repurchase their own shares.

title: First time since 1972, humans leave Earth orbit: Artemis II astronauts head for the Moon; what comes next?
content:
For the first time since 1972, humans have left Earth orbit.
*   The Artemis II mission is carrying astronauts towards the Moon.
*   This event sparks questions and anticipation about the next steps in human space exploration.

title: UK Police seek anonymous letter writer to solve 13-year-old mystery of mother, five children killed in house fire
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   UK Police are seeking an anonymous letter writer.
*   The writer is believed to hold information crucial to solving a 13-year-old cold case.
*   The mystery involves the deaths of a mother and her five children in a house fire.

title: Several minority scholarship schemes discontinued after 2021-22, Minority Affairs Minister tells Rajya Sabha
content:
The Minority Affairs Minister informed the Rajya Sabha about a policy change regarding scholarship schemes.
*   Several scholarship programs specifically benefiting minority communities have been discontinued.
*   This discontinuation came into effect for periods after the 2021-22 academic year.

title: U.P. Government committed to ensuring every eligible and needy person receives benefits of welfare schemes, says CM Adityanath
content:
U.P. CM Adityanath affirms the government's commitment to welfare schemes.
*   The primary goal is to ensure benefits reach all eligible persons.
*   The government prioritizes assistance for every needy individual.

title: Election Commission asks NIA to probe Malda violence
content:
The Election Commission (EC) has formally requested an investigation.
*   They have specifically tasked the National Investigation Agency (NIA) to conduct this probe.
*   The investigation will focus on the recent violence that occurred in Malda.
